data.name: SEX CLUB Simulator 🔞🍓
data.detailed_description:
You’ve just been handed the reins of a thriving club, but keeping it afloat is no small task - hire staff, plan events and make sure your girls are happy. But the club isn’t just a business – prepare for a place full of drama, intense encounters and secrets waiting to be uncovered.

You’re going to transform the club completely: new venue, more rooms, “auditions” with the girls - you’ll constantly earn in-game currency, which allows for improvements and helps unlock more and more adult content.

Get familiar with your staff and coworkers as you’re trying to balance the nightlife chaos and personal connections. Meet a wide cast of characters from the playful bartender to rich VIP clients, each bringing their own intrigue and offering rewards for those who dare to dive deeper into their lives.

The fate of the business – and your relationships – rests in your hands. Step into the nightlife and create the city’s most legendary club - the game offers a mix of fun story, neon strip-club vibes, steaming hot 18+ scenes and an engaging gameplay inspired by classic clicker games.

Key Features:
  • Adult content 🔞 – build relationships and unlock 18+ scenes as you connect with your staff.
  • Club management 📊 – plan events, handle crises, and manage the chaos of a rising nightclub.
  • Beautiful visuals ✨ – juicy animations and detailed environments bring your nightclub to life.
  • Characters to explore 👱‍♀️ – explore deep relationships and uncover the secrets of those around you.
  • Interactive gameplay 🎮 – make impactful choices that shape the story and determine your club’s future.

data.short_description: Step into the nightlife world - welcome to SEX CLUB Simulator 🔞🍓, where you take on the role of a nightclub manager in a world of glamour, secrets, and hot adult encounters. Manage your club, meet fascinating characters and click your way through to create unforgettable nights.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or higher
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX compatible graphics card
  • 儲存空間: 4 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: MacOS
  • 處理器: Apple Silicon, Intel
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Linux
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX compatible graphics card
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
